\subsection{Methods}\label{methods}
We used the following approach:

\begin{enumerate}
\item Collect data from \emph{multiple sources}

\item Apply the transformation $T(x) = \frac{1}{1 + e^{-x}}$

\item Validate results

\end{enumerate}
